example.title: Sprint-5 amber on AC-rewrite triggers early conversation
example.inputs: AC-rewrite rate = 11% on sprint 5 day 6 (amber 5-15%). 3 stories with rewritten AC, all in reporting module.
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (metric measured), r3 (caught mid-sprint), r4 (named action), r5 (BA owned).
